docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT DENIS JUMP, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA SOMA SOFA INC LLC DOES 1 TO X
